lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Good news is, win or lose, I get paid the same either way.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Bad news is... I'm still eight hundred and seventy thousand short.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: It's the amount I need to finally quit this job.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Compared to how much I want out, it's still way too slow.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: My goal is to save up one million Shell Credits. Then I can be free from House Grandino.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: I've been grinding toward that for five years. No breaks. No complaints. Followed every order. Juggled four side jobs despite being under constant surveillance...
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Anyway. Here's your reward. The Dustbound Medal.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: The next Lord of Prestige is near <te href=850172>Cliffside Harbor</te>. Head there.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: As for me, I've gotta get back to work. Goodbye.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige
